allow: Bash(xargs kill -9 echo "Killed old processes" sleep 2 ps aux)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat\(website\): add Telegram Growth Bot with 3 AI agents

- Growth Lead agent for planning and task generation
- Content Agent for Twitter/Telegram posts \(2-3 variants\)
- Opportunity Hunter for grants and accelerators
- Linear integration: create tasks, change statuses, view details
- /roadmap N command to generate N-day plan with due dates
- Text commands: "план на 10 дней", "выполнено E-XX", etc.
- Markdown to HTML conversion for Telegram formatting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
